title: World Size Display
description: Displays the size of each world directly in the world selection screen.
body:
![#World Size Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15dc678a9b24122577112cbca6e888fd2a45a80.png)

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-green)
![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow)

Always know how big your worlds are before loading them!

## ✨ Features

### 🌍 World Size at a Glance
- **Live Size Display** - Shows world size (KB/MB/GB) next to the world name
- **Smart Visibility** - Size appears on hover and stays visible when selected
- **Auto Formatting** - Automatically scales between KB, MB, and GB

## 🚀 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download [World Size Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-size-display/versions)
4. Place the JAR file in your `.minecraft/mods/` folder

## 🔧 Technical Details

- **Client-side only** - Works without server installation
- **Requirements**:
   - Fabric Loader 0.18.2+
   - Fabric API

## 🤝 Compatibility

- Compatible with most world management mods
- No conflicts with resource packs

## 🐛 Reporting Issues

Found a bug or have a feature request?
[Open an issue](https://github.com/Astralis-B/world-size-display/issues)

Please include:
- Minecraft version
- Mod version
- Other installed mods
- Steps to reproduce the issue

*"Because size does matter, at least for your worlds."*
